span.p:
17 Entities (all inherit BaseEntity)
Tenant | User | Customer | ConsentRecord
Appointment | Service | AuditLog
Message | ScheduledMessage
Template | TemplateLocaleVariant
Plan | UsageRecord | TenantSettings
AgentRun | ToolCallLog | ProcessedEvent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
7 Enums
AppointmentStatus | ConsentStatus | ConsentSource
MessageDirection | MessageStatus
ScheduledMessageStatus | UserRole

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BaseEntity
Id | TenantId | CreatedAt | UpdatedAt
IsDeleted | DeletedAt

IPublicBookingService
